InTransit
  • Blog
  • Support

The Best iOS App for
Indian Metros.

No more fusses, just easy commutes. Get real-time updates, accessibility guidance, and beautiful maps for every major metro in India.

Let InTransit take your hand

Everything you need for a smooth journey, right in your pocket and on your wrist

Live Activities

Visually stunning updates bring next stop, interchange, and ETA information right to your Home Screen and Dynamic Island. Never miss your stop again.

Accessibility First

Navigate with confidence. Get detailed guidance on elevators, ramps, and platform access, making metro travel truly inclusive for everyone.

Reliable Offline

Access high-quality maps and essential route information even when you're deep underground with zero signal. Built for the reality of transit.

7 Cities & Counting…

Covering the heart of India's urban mobility.

Ahmedabad • Bengaluru • Chennai • Kolkata • Mumbai • New Delhi • Pune

Each city supports all active and under-construction lines. We map them before they even open.

Private by Design

Your data is not our business. We never collect information that can identify you. No tracking, just transit.

View Privacy Policy

Made for India

Built with pride in India, for the unique challenges of Indian commuters. Full support for local languages in every city we serve.

Ready to go?

Join thousands of commuters enjoying a smarter way to travel.

Questions? I'm here to help.

InTransit is made by Nikhil, an Indie developer making software for iOS and macOS.

You can read InTransit's Terms and Privacy Policy.
